ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Piccinini for and with Steven Douglas. Michael Freedman for Jason Douglas (Petitioner).

Counsel stated that they wanted the matter set for hearing. The matter was referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Compel Administrator To Account; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge; Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Estate For Payment Of Attorney Fees. For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Continued To Feb-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Jason Douglas (Objector). Daniel Piccinini for and with Stephen Douglas (Administrator).

Mr. Freedman stated that they had mediation set for January 19, 2011. The matter was continued to February 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation and for setting of an evidentiary hearing.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Continued To Dec-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Administrator To Account; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge; Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Estate For Payment Of Attorney Fees. For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Continued To Dec-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Administrator To Account; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge; Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Estate For Payment Of Attorney Fees. For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Continued To Dec-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Piccinini for and with Steven Douglas (Administrator). Michael Freedman for Jason Douglas.

Mr. Piccinini stated that the accounting was filed yesterday. Mr. Freedman stated that they had not selected a mediator. Counsel held discussions outside of the Courtroom. Upon returning, the mediation completion date was extended and the matter was continued to December 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith.

Petition To Compel Administrator To Account; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge; Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Estate For Payment Of Attorney Fees. For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Continued To Oct-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Piccinini for and with Steven Douglas (Administrator). Michael Freedman for Jason Douglas (Petitioner).

Mr. Piccinini stated that a response had not been filed, that it was best to set the matter for mediation and that he could have an accounting filed within two months. Mr. Freedman stated that mediation would not be helpful without an accounting, that some discovery needed to be conducted, that they needed an order requiring an accounting and that it may be appropriate to request removal of the Administrator if there are deficiencies with the accounting. Mr. Piccinini stated that the Inventory and Appraisal needed to be amended and that he was not objecting to an order requirng an accounting. The accounting is to be filed by October 26, 2010. Mr. Freedman will prepare said order. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 23, 2010. A status conference is set for October 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
